_meta.keyKnowledge: We create movement sequences that manipulate the elements of dance and use choreographic processes to tell stories and express ideas.

_source.w: We create movement sequences that manipulate the elements of dance and use choreographic processes to tell stories and express ideas.
y: Choreographic skills let us craft dances that communicate complex ideas and emotions.
Manipulating dance elements gives us precise control over how our audience experiences our work.
Creating dances develops both our artistic vision and our physical capabilities.
eg: We ask 'How is the body used to represent a story or character?' when developing our dance.
We explore how space, levels and formations can create different moods and meanings.
We use choreographic devices like repetition, canon and contrast to build our dance.
We create a dance inspired by a social issue and perform it for our school community.
We refine our choreography by rehearsing and making adjustments based on feedback.
We combine individual and group movement to create dynamic visual effects.
